summary: github.com/teamswyg/riido-contracts is a public, standard-library-only Go module for shared Riido contracts.

package_rules.dependency: Allowed dependencies are Go standard library, package-local tests, and task -> ir.
package_rules.forbidden: Third-party dependencies, runtime repo imports, Terraform/AWS/Docker/provider CLI/credential packages, and runtime adapter packages are forbidden.
package_rules.tag_boundary: The Go module tag is the distribution boundary; promotion requires at least one downstream import gate.

packages.role: C1 task lifecycle states and transition matrix
packages.must_not_own: scheduler, local task DB, validation execution

packages.role: C2 canonical event envelope, event catalog, reducer contract
C3 provider capability and fingerprint vocabulary
packages.must_not_own: provider detection, process launch, real CLI probing

packages.role: C11/C10 distribution and provider routing status vocabulary
packages.must_not_own: app data roots, IPC, consent storage, store helper implementation

packages.role: C10 assignment polling DTOs and state vocabulary
packages.must_not_own: control-plane store actor, HTTP/SSE handlers, authorization, persistence

packages.role: C10 API DSL, API IR, generated OpenAPI projection fixtures, API enum/sum-type vocabulary
packages.must_not_own: control-plane handlers, frontend implementation, authorization/RBAC implementation, generated client code

packages.role: public FSM pattern vocabulary generated from Common Lisp pattern sources
packages.must_not_own: runtime state execution, provider-specific reducer policy, cloud/workflow orchestration

packages.role: C10 AI Agent runtime progress message DSL/IR, integer code catalog, locale templates, append-only validation
packages.must_not_own: provider output parsing, control-plane HTTP/SSE handlers, frontend rendering behavior
runtime code generation output, network calls, third-party parser dependencies

packages.role: deterministic progress-message DSL to IR drift verifier/generator
packages.must_not_own: daemon runtime emission, control-plane SSE rendering, frontend message rendering

packages.role: Common Lisp enum/transition/pattern projection into Go FSM SPI, fsmmeta, README Mermaid, conformance gates
packages.must_not_own: runtime path discovery, repository-local process orchestration, provider-specific reducer policy

packages.role: repository-local go tool gotmpl renderer for generated Go templates
packages.must_not_own: third-party template dependencies, runtime rendering, network calls

packages.role: deterministic verifier for SSOT dependency manifest and acyclic repo dependency graph
packages.must_not_own: downstream repository execution gates, live Riido task mutation, third-party graph parsers

allowed: codegen-safe enum and sum-type contract shapes

public_gates.verification: go list -m all returns only this module
task transition tests reference real IR event constants
contract JSON and generated Go constants alignment
tools/enumgen and tools/fsmgen verify Common Lisp metadata, Go SPI, fsmmeta, and README Mermaid drift
DSL/IR/OpenAPI drift verification plus AI Agent projection tests
tools/ssotdeps verifies manifest source phrases and acyclic repo graph
tools/architecturedocs verifies required docs, generated readers, package coverage, and stale runtime wording

downstream_gates.expected_gate: imports tagged task/IR/provider/hostintegration/assignment packages and runs daemon compatibility tests
imports tagged assignment/provider/hostintegration packages and runs control-plane compatibility tests
consumes generated OpenAPI projection and runs client/API compatibility tests
consumes the same generated AI Agent client OpenAPI projection as web
consumes only tagged public contracts or public facades; no private runtime imports

loop.observation: Architecture reader docs and workflow bash checks duplicated package and integration facts without a single evidence artifact.
loop.hypothesis: A compact architecture manifest can generate reader docs and verify required docs, package coverage, stale runtime wording, and downstream gate declarations in public CI.
loop.execute: Render module decomposition and integration matrix docs from this manifest and publish architecturedocs evidence.
loop.evaluate: The verifier fails on stale generated docs, missing required docs, missing package coverage, forbidden runtime wording, or malformed gate declarations.
loop.retrospective: Architecture documentation becomes executable repository topology evidence instead of prose maintained by memory.
